---
title: "CV"
page-layout: full
execute:
  freeze: true
resources:
  - cv.pdf
cv:
  pdf: cv.pdf
---

```{=html}
<style>
.cv-wrapper {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.cv-frame {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100vh;
  border: 0.5px solid #ccc;
  display: block;
}
</style>

::: {#about-block}

<p class="text-center"> <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="cv.pdf" target="_blank"> <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download current CV </a> </p> <div class="cv-wrapper"> <iframe class="cv-frame" src="cv.pdf#toolbar=1&navpanes=0&scrollbar=1&view=FitH"> </iframe> </div>

:::
